title: Original models which sold like hotcakes
display_title: Original models which sold like hotcakes
wikitext:
[]: Original models which sold like hotcakes             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Jun 10, 2014 8:18 am What did those actually look like, I have searched then net but are unsure if they are the recent ones or not. Im referring to the models they sold featuring everyone in suggestive poses at the time the tv show was aired, Gainax are dirty little insert bad words.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jun 10, 2014 9:44 am Wrong forum. Also, what the hell are you talking about?

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Jun 10, 2014 11:34 am I mean the original Evangelion models of the characters they published when the TV show aired in Japan, it was bandaged Rei and the other female character doing suggestive poses. I read that on the internet and wondered what they looked like, I did a general search but was unsure if they were the actual ones from back then or newly printed so I posted here to see if you guys have pics. Yea I quickly posted this when on a tablet, sorry. Should have given more details, didn't know where else to put this so placed it here. Move it to wherever if you want to.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue Jun 10, 2014 11:36 am ^ I think he is talking about those statues I saw at the comic con, they had nude statues of Rei and Asuka. Some had clothes but they were barely there.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jun 10, 2014 1:47 pm These ones? Lewd and NSFW warning: http://i.minus.com/ibnDkrtH9JBLTl.jpg [s]These are all resin kits sculpted by fans and sold under limited license at events. [/s] EDIT: Actually all those kits on that page were available from Volks under the X-Brand label. Not as rare as event kits but still limited numbers. As with all resin kits the production runs are small for the originals. You can get recasts if you really want. Some of the shady sites even offer painted versions for extra $$ if you don't want to do the work yourself. But these were never officially mass produced. They aren't from the original broadcast timeframe, but from 2000-2001-ish. There's a few more lewd Rei figures, but I don't have those pics laying around. EDIT: Actually looking again through the Eva Figure Catalog there is a ton more lewd figures than I remember. Most are even kits though.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Jun 10, 2014 2:23 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rei_Ayanami#cite_ref-28 Took me a while to figure out where that quote was, it was on Rei's Wikipedia page. That mentioned the models at release,I want to see what those specific ones looked like. This stupid tablet keeps posting the links at the top.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue Jun 10, 2014 5:18 pm @ TM Those would be the ones Good Sir, I also saw some that had them dressed up as booth babes.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Jun 10, 2014 7:08 pm Why are all the models faces messed up, it seriously putting me off from ever buying one. They also look a bit cheaply made, Rei's face on the models looks awful. Barely anywhere near what she looks like in the anime or have I been looking at the wrong ones, can someone recommend one that actually looks like her.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Jun 10, 2014 7:20 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: These ones? Lewd and NSFW warning: http://i.minus.com/ibnDkrtH9JBLTl.jpg [s]These are all resin kits sculpted by fans and sold under limited license at events. [/s] EDIT: Actually all those kits on that page were available from Volks under the X-Brand label. Not as rare as event kits but still limited numbers. As with all resin kits the production runs are small for the originals. You can get recasts if you really want. Some of the shady sites even offer painted versions for extra $$ if you don't want to do the work yourself. But these were never officially mass produced. They aren't from the original broadcast timeframe, but from 2000-2001-ish. There's a few more lewd Rei figures, but I don't have those pics laying around. EDIT: Actually looking again through the Eva Figure Catalog there is a ton more lewd figures than I remember. Most are even kits though.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed Jun 11, 2014 3:31 pm Yea their faces are messed up, just look at maya's expression. I will admit, those porn models do look very well made. What are average prices on ones like that. Anyhow does anyone have an idea about those original 95 models I mentioned, im guessing no.
